elements.text: It's Sunday morning and you are swimming laps at the pool. After a couple of laps you feel out of breath and decide to break for a minute at the end of the lane. Gasping for breath makes you feel anxious, and you want to stop...

elements.name: swimming_laps--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
